title: Lucid Motors secures $1.5 billion funding from Saudi Arabia's PIF
text: Lucid Motors secured an additional $1.5 billion from Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund in August 2024. The funding was announced alongside Q2 earnings results that beat revenue expectations. This latest capital infusion brought total PIF investments in Lucid to over $5 billion. The continued support from Saudi Arabia's sovereign wealth fund provided breathing room for the company to continue scaling production and developing the Gravity SUV. However, the reliance on external funding to cover operating losses raised questions about capital efficiency and the company's path to self-sustainability. Market analysts noted that continued funding from PIF appeared almost unlimited given strategic interests, but investor caution remained about whether such funding could indefinitely sustain Lucid's operations.
